creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Phil Dennis-Jordan from comment #20)
I am not aware of any changes that would impact this, but we still don't know what the problem is.  The largest known I226 user (netgate) has no issues.

The only thing I can say for certain so far is you all should be bugging the HW vendors for NVM 2.25 or 2.27 for I226 otherwise there are known issues around both EEE enabled and disabled.  It would be nice to know what happens once that is achieved, to level if we are chasing a FreeBSD bug and not fixed microcode issues.
